description: 12 key datapoints from ESRS E1 covering GHG emissions, energy, and climate targets.

datapoints.label: Scope 1 GHG Emissions
datapoints.description: Total gross Scope 1 GHG emissions in metric tons CO2 equivalent
datapoints.search_query: Scope 1 gross emissions 55200 natural gas diesel propane metric tons CO2e

datapoints.label: Scope 2 GHG Emissions (market-based)
datapoints.description: Scope 2 market-based GHG emissions in tCO2e
datapoints.search_query: Scope 2 market-based GHG emissions purchased electricity

datapoints.label: Scope 3 GHG Emissions (total)
datapoints.description: Total Scope 3 GHG emissions across all categories
datapoints.search_query: Scope 3 emissions product manufacturing use end of life metric tons

datapoints.label: Total Energy Consumption
datapoints.description: Total energy consumption from all sources
datapoints.search_query: total energy consumption electricity heat fuel MWh GWh

datapoints.label: Renewable Energy Percentage
datapoints.description: Share of energy from renewable sources
datapoints.search_query: 100 percent renewable electricity energy facilities clean

datapoints.label: Net Zero Target Year
datapoints.description: Year by which the company commits to reach net zero emissions
datapoints.search_query: carbon neutral 2030 net zero Apple goal target

datapoints.label: Near-term Emission Reduction Target
datapoints.description: Percentage reduction target for Scope 1+2 by 2030
datapoints.search_query: 2030 emission reduction target Scope 1 Scope 2 near-term

datapoints.label: SBTi Validation
datapoints.description: Whether targets are validated by the Science Based Targets initiative
datapoints.search_query: Science Based Targets SBTi validated approved aligned

datapoints.label: Climate Transition Plan
datapoints.description: Whether a climate transition plan has been adopted
datapoints.search_query: climate transition plan adopted decarbonization roadmap

datapoints.label: Climate Physical Risk Exposure
datapoints.description: Whether material physical climate risks have been identified
datapoints.search_query: physical climate risk identified material acute chronic TCFD

datapoints.label: Carbon Credits / Offsets Used
datapoints.description: Volume of carbon credits purchased or used for neutralisation
datapoints.search_query: carbon credits offsets purchased neutralisation removal certificates

datapoints.label: GHG Emission Intensity
datapoints.description: GHG emissions per unit of revenue or output
datapoints.search_query: GHG emission intensity per revenue per unit carbon intensity ratio
